sections.paragraph:
Original: נחשׁתּא

Transliteration: nechûshtâ'

Phonetic: nekh-oosh-taw'

BDB Definition:

Nehushta = "brass"
  1. daughter of Elnathan, wife of king Jehoiakim of Judah and mother of king Jehoiachin of Judah

Origin: from H5178

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Feminine
